name: Dangerous Road
short_description: Dangerous road is a cars game it has a large map and about 5 missions and it will be updated in the future the game has more than 5 driving behavior and more than 50 cars also there is a story mode that will be available in the next updates the game is focusing the drift and the realistic drive
detailed_description: Dangerous road is a cars game it has a large map and about 5 missions and it will be updated in the future the game has more than 5 driving behavior and more than 50 cars also there is a story mode that will be available in the next updates the game is focusing the drift and the realistic drive and there is a truck mode that will be available in the next updates you can drive with keyboard and xbox/ps4 controller and wheel steer
